tasks.title: Set up Bitwarden Secrets Manager
tasks.description: Boot Industries BW org on vault.bitwarden.eu. See BKX121/122 for migration history. MLX-LM API keys, KuCoin, Matrix tokens all candidates for storage.

tasks.title: Security audit — Matrix MCP
tasks.description: Evaluate attack surface of matrix-boot and matrix-coord MCP servers. Threat model: prompt injection via Matrix events, token leakage, event namespace spoofing (`dev.ig88.*`).

tasks.title: Security audit — Tailscale MCP
tasks.description: Review Tailscale ACL MCP exposure. CRITICAL: never use `manage_acl` with `operation: update` — drops ssh/nodeAttrs sections. Read-only audit only.

tasks.title: Implement comprehensive backup system
tasks.description: Scope: coordinator config, agent soul/principles files, Graphiti graph, Qdrant collections, tasks.json, loop specs. Target: automated daily backup to Cloudkicker + off-site (Bitwarden or R2).

tasks.title: Rename coordinator project directory on Blackbox
tasks.description: /home/nesbitt/projects/ig88/` → `/home/nesbitt/projects/coordinator/` or `blackbox/`. Breaking change: systemd service files, token paths in `.config/ig88/`, agent-config.yaml. Needs coordinated cutover session. Tracked as tech debt in GSD002/GSD003.

tasks.title: Rename Matrix event namespace
tasks.description: dev.ig88.coordinator_generated` → `dev.blackbox.*`. Breaking change requiring coordinated rollout across coordinator.ts and all agent configs. Deferred from GSD002.

tasks.title: Create `@blackbox:matrix.org` Matrix account for coordinator
tasks.description: Coordinator currently uses Boot's token. Independent account eliminates confusion and prevents Boot's session count from being polluted. See GSD002/GSD003.

tasks.title: Fix systemd build path mismatch on Blackbox
tasks.description: npm run build` writes to `/dist/`, systemd runs from `/src/dist/`. Silent deployment failures. Identified in GSD003. Fix: align ExecStart with tsconfig outDir or update tsconfig.

tasks.title: Cross-repo synthesis in projects-vault
tasks.description: Establish automated or semi-automated process for syncing key decisions across BKX, FCT, IG88, BTI, KLK prefix docs into a unified Obsidian view. Relates to the research vault reindex workflow.

tasks.title: Evaluate deprecation timeline for portal v5 on :41933
tasks.description: v8 is live at :41988. v5 on :41933 still serves agents via GSD protocol. Can only decommission after agents fully migrated to coordinator-rs dispatch.

tasks.title: Give agents browser tools
tasks.description: Integrate Claudezilla Firefox MCP or equivalent into agent configs. Required for: daily apartment/job search loops, Twitter ingest, general web research. Security boundary: browser tool scope must be constrained per agent — Kelk gets general web, IG-88 gets trading/data sites only.

tasks.title: Give agents email tools
tasks.description: Email read/send capability. Candidate: memex-mcp email archive (already referenced in FCT001 as shared memory source). Requires credential isolation — agent email access should be scoped, not full inbox.

tasks.title: Give agents wallets / on-chain capability
tasks.description: IG-88 context primarily. CCXT for KuCoin is already in scope (FCT001). Broader wallet tooling (self-custody, on-chain txns) is a separate capability layer. Research-phase: assess risk surface before granting.

tasks.title: Implement dreaming and self-training sessions
tasks.description: Autonomous off-hours agent sessions that review logs, synthesize learnings, and write structured memory. Maps to `austin_hurwitz` self-improvement cron pattern (BKX115). Requires: loop_engine.rs wired into dispatch, per-iteration budget, morning summary output.

tasks.title: Implement MemSkill feedback loop for agent memory
tasks.description: Agents learn what to remember based on task outcome feedback. From BKX115/MemSkill framework. Would improve Graphiti/Qdrant retrieval quality over time for Boot and Kelk.

tasks.title: Implement calibration loop for agent autonomy scoring
tasks.description: Dynamic per-task autonomy scoring with time decay (BKX112 — ericosiu pattern). Agents earn autonomy through demonstrated competence. Maps to existing L1–L4 trust level system in lifecycle.rs but adds per-task granularity.

tasks.title: Implement audit trail — approval history queryability
tasks.description: Paperclip pattern #14. Current approval files are HMAC-signed flat files. Add structured JSONL index for queryable approval history (agent, gate type, decision, timestamp). Needed for compliance and capacity planning.

tasks.title: Daily apartment search loop
tasks.description: Kelk-domain autonomous loop. Browser tool required. Loop Spec: researcher-type, metric = listings matching criteria, daily cadence. Output: digest to Matrix room.

tasks.title: Daily job search loop
tasks.description: Kelk-domain. Scrape job boards (LinkedIn, Glassdoor, niche boards). Match against criteria profile. Output: ranked shortlist digest. Separate from apartment loop — different data sources and match criteria.

tasks.title: Weekly events search loop
tasks.description: Weekly cadence. Local events (concerts, markets, exhibitions) that match interests. Browser + location. Output: weekly digest on Sunday evening.

tasks.title: Twitter / X research ingest loop
tasks.description: Monitor key accounts and search terms. Extract signal, strip noise. Write to `inbox/` in projects-vault (reindex pipeline). Candidate for researcher-type Loop Spec. Complements the existing research vault ingest from other sources.

tasks.title: Tax reconciliation via Chainly / Koinly and Wealthsimple
tasks.description: Annual tax prep workflow. IG-88 trade log is already SQLite (FCT001 §8). Needs: export format matching Koinly CSV schema, Wealthsimple account data, CAD exchange rate lookup. Human review required before filing. Not fully automatable — agent prepares the package, human verifies and submits.

tasks.title: Self-security audit (red-team)
tasks.description: Agent-driven red-team of the Factory stack. Boot attempts adversarial inputs, prompt injection via Matrix events, frozen harness bypass attempts. Results logged as security incident report. Inspired by Chrysb "Agents of Chaos" pattern (BKX114).

tasks.title: Mermaid docs and HTML guide generation loop
tasks.description: Auto-generate or keep current the Mermaid architecture diagrams and HTML guides for the coordinator and portal. Boot-domain. Could run on change detection (git hook trigger).

tasks.title: Write first real Loop Spec (researcher type)
tasks.description: FCT010 explicitly deferred this: "Write a researcher loop spec in `~/dev/autoresearch/loop-specs/` and run it end-to-end." Prerequisite for proving loop_engine.rs works in production.

tasks.title: IG-88 narrative loop (market narrative accuracy)
tasks.description: Narrative-type Loop Spec. 15-minute cadence. Frozen: Governor risk limits, KuCoin MCP config. Metric: narrative accuracy rate (7-day rolling). Designed in FCT009 but no spec file exists yet.

tasks.title: Wire live data endpoints into portal dashboard components
tasks.description: FCT011 next steps item. Portal v8 renders with mock/stub data. Needs coordinator-rs HTTP API endpoints live so dashboard, topology, analytics, and budget pages show real agent state.

tasks.title: Build approval inbox page (FCT006 P1.1)
tasks.description: Pending approvals list, gate type badge, approve/reject buttons, resolved history. Polls `GET /approvals/pending`. Detailed spec in FCT006 §4 Phase 1.

tasks.title: Build live agent run cards (FCT006 P1.2)
tasks.description: Live transcript tail for active agents on Mission Control dashboard. Cyan border + glow aesthetic. Polls enhanced `/status/{agent}.json` with transcript_tail.

tasks.title: Build budget status page (FCT006 P1.3)
tasks.description: Per-agent budget card, utilization progress bar, color-coded status (green/amber/red), pause indicator, override button. Polls `GET /budget/status`.

tasks.title: Add dashboard metric cards (FCT006 P2.1)
tasks.description: 4-card metric row: Agents Active, Tasks In Progress, Month Spend, Pending Approvals. Feeds from existing + new endpoints.

tasks.title: Build analytics charts page (FCT006 P2.2)
tasks.description: 14-day activity charts (run activity, task status, assignee breakdown, approval rate). Requires `GET /analytics/summary?days=N` from coordinator or Python aggregator.

tasks.title: Build per-agent detail pages (FCT006 P3.1)
tasks.description: Per-agent config, run history, full transcript viewer, budget card. FCT006 Phase 3.

tasks.title: Build agent control panel (FCT006 P3.2)
tasks.description: Pause/resume/heartbeat/cancel actions from portal. Requires coordinator-rs HTTP control API. FCT006 Phase 3.

tasks.title: JSX budget tracker component
tasks.description: Standalone React budget tracker component. May emerge naturally from FCT-033. Research whether this warrants a separate widget or is subsumed by the budget page.

tasks.title: Add WebSocket streaming to portal (FCT006 P4.3)
tasks.description: Replace 5s polling with WebSocket push from coordinator-rs. Reduces approval inbox latency. FCT006 Phase 4. Low engineering priority — polling adequate at current scale.

tasks.title: Evaluate deprecation of GSD sidecar (server.py on :41935)
tasks.description: Once coordinator-rs provides the live task/budget/agent state API, the Python GSD backend on port 41935 becomes redundant. Migration to coordinator-native endpoints closes this loop.

tasks.title: Research Project Narwhal
tasks.description: Unknown scope. Capture the concept and assess fit with Factory infrastructure before committing effort.

tasks.title: Research Tooltime
tasks.description: Unknown scope. Likely a tool management / skill registry concept. Assess.

tasks.title: Research Pandalite Browser
tasks.description: Potentially a lightweight browser automation approach or local browser for agents. Assess whether it supersedes or complements Claudezilla.

tasks.title: Research Mirofish
tasks.description: Unknown. Capture and assess.

tasks.title: Evaluate JSX in Obsidian
tasks.description: Obsidian doesn't natively render React/JSX. Assess whether a plugin enables it and whether the use case (budget tracker, kanban) justifies the complexity vs. native Obsidian views.

tasks.title: Evaluate JSX in Element (Matrix client)
tasks.description: Whether React/JSX widgets can be embedded in Matrix rooms via Element widgets API. Would enable rich in-chat approval UI and dashboard embeds. Requires custom room widget configuration.

tasks.title: Research Obsidian in Chainly
tasks.description: Whether Obsidian vault can be surfaced or integrated inside Chainly workflow tooling. Assess integration surface.

tasks.title: Obsidian tutorials — structured learning path
tasks.description: Develop a structured learning path for Obsidian advanced features (Dataview, Templater, Canvas, plugins). Relevant to vault usage as agent knowledge substrate.

tasks.title: Evaluate local model / agent planning documentation
tasks.description: Originally listed as "local model/agent planning (docs/fct/)". Scope: document the complete MLX model lineup (Qwen3.5, LFM2.5, Nanbeige), per-agent model assignment rationale, and upgrade path. FCT001 has initial architecture; this would be a living update.

tasks.title: Develop comprehensive agent configs
tasks.description: Full YAML agent configs in `~/dev/blackbox/src/agents/` for Boot, IG-88, Kelk, and Nan with current model assignments, budget limits, trust levels, Loop Spec references, and MCP tool whitelists.

tasks.title: Wire coordinator-rs modules into main dispatch loop
tasks.description: FCT008 next steps item. task_lease, budget, runtime_state, and run_events are implemented but not wired into the live coordinator.rs dispatch path. This is the blocker for all live agent orchestration.

tasks.title: Implement loop state persistence to `loop_state_file
tasks.description: FCT010 deferred item. Serialize active loops to `loop_state_file` on change; reload on startup. Enables loop recovery across coordinator restarts.

tasks.title: Implement session compaction module (Paperclip pattern #6)
tasks.description: session_compaction.rs`. Thresholds: 10 runs, 100K tokens, 24h age. On trigger: generate handoff markdown via local MLX, start fresh session with summary as initial context. Detailed spec in FCT007 §Pattern #6.

tasks.title: Implement metric extraction from agent output
tasks.description: FCT010 deferred item. Define structured output format for loop agents; parse `LoopMetricResult` from `ClaudeResultMessage`. Required for loop iteration keep/discard decisions to be automated.

tasks.title: Implement wakeup request coalescing (Paperclip pattern #9)
tasks.description: Multiple Matrix events arriving simultaneously trigger separate dispatch cycles. Coalescing batches events within a 3s window before dispatch, preventing duplicate agent activations. FCT007 §Pattern #9.

tasks.title: Implement context snapshots (Paperclip pattern #10)
tasks.description: Persist agent context snapshot to disk at each heartbeat. Enables debugging of "what did the agent know at the time." JSONB-equivalent via serde_json to file. FCT007 §Pattern #10.

tasks.title: Implement log store abstraction (Paperclip pattern #11)
tasks.description: Structured logging backend for run transcripts. Currently JSONL flat files. Pattern #11 adds: per-run log file with structured query capability, retention policy, log level filtering.

tasks.title: Implement approval comments / threaded discussion (Paperclip pattern #14)
tasks.description: Replace binary emoji reactions with threaded Matrix message discussion on approval requests. Enables operator to ask clarifying questions before approving. FCT007 §Pattern #14.

tasks.title: Implement agent config revisions (Paperclip pattern #15)
tasks.description: Version-controlled agent config history. Each change to `coordinator.toml` / agent YAML is snapshotted with timestamp and author. Enables rollback and audit. FCT007 §Pattern #15.

tasks.title: Add coordinator-rs HTTP REST control API
tasks.description: Scaffold REST API endpoints needed by portal (FCT006): `/approvals/pending`, `/approvals/{id}/decide`, `/budget/status`, `/agents/{id}/pause`, `/agents/{id}/resume`, `/analytics/summary`. Prerequisite for portal data wiring (FCT-030).

tasks.title: Wire budget composition (deduct_iteration_tokens into BudgetTracker)
tasks.description: FCT010 deferred item. `deduct_iteration_tokens()` API exists in loop_engine.rs but is not connected to BudgetTracker. Required for loop budget enforcement to be active.

tasks.title: Implement swarm loop type (multi-delegate)
tasks.description: Most complex loop type from autoscope design. Requires N sub-delegate orchestration, per-branch iteration budgets, synthesis deduplication. FCT010 deferred as "future sprint."

tasks.title: Implement goal ancestry context injection (Paperclip pattern #12)
tasks.description: Inject 4-level goal hierarchy (Mission → Project → Agent → Task) into every task dispatch. Factory does not currently have a formal goal model. Adopt as Loop Spec `[goal]` block convention. FCT004 §LEARN section.

tasks.title: Add token metering to budget.rs (replace invocation-count proxy)
tasks.description: Budget.rs currently tracks invocation count as proxy. When MLX-LM exposes per-request token counts, replace with actual token consumption. Monitor MLX-LM releases. FCT008 architecture decision.

tasks.title: coordinator-rs migration to `factory/coordinator/
tasks.description: Closed by FCT008

tasks.description: Closed by FCT008

tasks.title: Implement approval_gate.rs (typed approval gates, 5 variants)
tasks.description: Closed by FCT008

tasks.title: Implement budget.rs (per-agent monthly tracking, soft/hard thresholds)
tasks.description: Closed by FCT008

tasks.title: Implement context_mode.rs (Fat/Thin context switching)
tasks.description: Closed by FCT008

tasks.title: Implement runtime_state.rs (cumulative per-agent state)
tasks.description: Closed by FCT008

tasks.title: Implement run_events.rs (append-only JSONL event streaming)
tasks.description: Closed by FCT008

tasks.title: FCT007 deep-dive: 14 additional Paperclip patterns catalogued
tasks.description: Closed by FCT008

tasks.title: Implement loop_engine.rs (LoopSpec, ActiveLoop, LoopManager)
tasks.description: Closed by FCT010

tasks.title: Add LoopIteration and InfraChange approval gate types
tasks.description: Closed by FCT010

tasks.title: Add 6 loop lifecycle RunEvent variants
tasks.description: Closed by FCT010

tasks.title: Add LoopConfig fields to config.rs
tasks.description: Closed by FCT010

tasks.title: Integrate LoopManager into coordinator.rs (!loop commands, frozen harness)
tasks.description: Closed by FCT010

tasks.title: Add build_loop_context() to agent.rs
tasks.description: Closed by FCT010

tasks.title: Portal v8 — indigo palette, 3-font stack, dark+light mode
tasks.description: Closed by FCT011

tasks.title: Portal v8 — useTheme hook with localStorage + prefers-color-scheme
tasks.description: Closed by FCT011

tasks.title: Portal v8 — hotkey navigation (1-7, backslash, Cmd+K)
tasks.description: Closed by FCT011

tasks.title: Portal v8 — enriched 5-section TopologyPage
tasks.description: Closed by FCT011

tasks.title: Portal v8 — deployment to Blackbox :41988
tasks.description: Closed by FCT011

tasks.title: GSD dashboard deployed to Blackbox (systemd, :41933)
tasks.description: Closed by GSD001

tasks.title: Agent trust level corrections (IG-88 L3→L2, Kelk L2→L3)
tasks.description: Closed by GSD002

tasks.title: Relay loop detector — 3 bugs fixed
tasks.description: Closed by GSD003

tasks.title: Coordinator branding rename (IG-88 Coordinator → Blackbox)
tasks.description: Closed by GSD003

tasks.title: Update systemd unit description to "Blackbox Matrix Coordinator"
tasks.description: Cosmetic. `/etc/systemd/system/matrix-coordinator.service` still says "IG-88 Matrix Coordinator". Requires sudo on Blackbox. GSD002/GSD003.

tasks.title: Add System Status room to agent-config.yaml
tasks.description: !jPovIiHiRrKTQWCOrp:matrix.org` — agents should either be configured for it or leave it. Currently unmanaged. GSD003.

tasks.title: Stress-test relay loop fix with rapid multi-agent message bursts
tasks.description: Verify the 3-bug relay loop fix from GSD003 holds under high-frequency concurrent message delivery across all three agents in shared rooms.

tasks.title: Plan coordinated directory rename: `ig88/` → `coordinator/` on Blackbox
tasks.description: Breaks: systemd ExecStart, token paths in `.config/ig88/`, agent-config.yaml references, deploy scripts, repo-commands.html. Needs a single coordinated cutover session. See FCT-005. GSD002/GSD003.

tasks.title: GSD health check endpoint in server.py
tasks.description: Add `/health` endpoint to GSD server.py for automated monitoring. Deferred from GSD001. Low priority given GSD sidecar deprecation path (FCT-040).

tasks.title: GSD task completion webhooks
tasks.description: Real-time agent notifications on task state changes. Deferred from GSD001. Low priority — superseded by coordinator-rs event streaming once FCT-055 is closed.

tasks.title: Prompt caching audit and CLAUDE.md restructuring
tasks.description: Source: BKX113. Restructure CLAUDE.md files (global, ~/dev/, factory/) to maximize cache hit rates. Stable content first, variable content last. trq212's 80% cost reduction is the target benchmark.

tasks.title: Implement compiled tool use for high-frequency agent workflows
tasks.description: Source: BKX113. Agents that write code to orchestrate tools outperform step-by-step tool calling (NickADobos, 245K views). Identify 2–3 recurring Boot workflows and pre-bake as compiled decision trees.

tasks.title: Write/review SOUL.md for each active agent
tasks.description: Source: BKX112. soul-first design thesis (tolibear_): agents need identity before capability. Review existing `soul/` files in `~/dev/blackbox/src/`. Apply Westworld principle — ruthless pruning to only directives that change behavior. Target: 40% token reduction.

tasks.title: Agent memory audit (three failure modes check)
tasks.description: Source: BKX111. Map Boot, IG-88, Kelk memory substrates (files, Qdrant, Graphiti). Test retrieval for 3 known facts per agent. Find one example of retrieval failure, staleness, or contradiction in the current system.

tasks.title: Design observability dashboard — 5 key agent health metrics
tasks.description: Source: BKX114. What to log: tool calls, token usage, error rates, task completion, approval latency. Minimum viable: markdown status page surfacing 5 signals. Full: portal analytics page (FCT-035).

tasks.title: Write spec for overnight / long-horizon task run
tasks.description: Source: BKX115. Overnight agent pattern. Requirements: scoped task queue, clear machine-readable success/failure criteria, circuit breaker on confidence drop, morning summary. Design as Loop Spec for Boot (infra-improve type).

tasks.title: Agent coordination protocol document
tasks.description: Source: BKX116. Draft explicit protocol for agent-to-agent state sharing, task handoff, conflict resolution. Currently informal. Maps to Common Ground Core pattern. Matrix messages + shared vault artifacts are the substrate.

tasks.title: Map current skill distribution across agents
tasks.description: Source: BKX112. List every skill across Boot, IG-88, Kelk. Identify consolidation and split opportunities. Question: could Boot and Kelk share skills, with identity files as the differentiator?

tasks.title: Estimate monthly token cost and identify optimization levers
tasks.description: Source: BKX114. Model tiering (FCT001 §2.2 already covers quantization), open-weight fallback (LiteLLM config), prompt caching (FCT-070). Produce a cost estimate spreadsheet covering: coordinator dispatch, inference per agent, portal polling.

tasks.title: Design test suite as control system for autonomous Boot operation
tasks.description: Source: BKX115. "What test could you write that would let Boot run unsupervised for 24 hours?" — BKX115 discussion question. Define machine-readable success/failure criteria for a representative Boot task category.

tasks.title: Evaluate harness vs. framework posture for Factory architecture
tasks.description: Source: BKX118. Is Factory a "framework" or a "harness"? mitchellh (harness engineering) thesis: frameworks are the wrong abstraction. Audit coordinator-rs against the harness model and identify where it is framework-like.

tasks.title: Implement stigmergic coordination artifacts between agents
tasks.description: Source: BKX116. molt_cornelius notes-as-pheromone-trails: agents coordinate through artifacts, not direct messages. Design intentional artifact creation — Boot writes structured status files that IG-88 and Kelk can consume without explicit routing.
